message:
fix(node): saturating arithmetic for delta subtraction and cluster counter

- counterfactual_replay.rs: use saturating_sub for loss delta computation
  to prevent potential i64 overflow when computing counterfactual vs
  original expected loss differences
- atc_participation_weighting.rs: use saturating_add(1) for sybil cluster
  counter increment, consistent with project-wide hardening convention

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
